content.problemStatement: Given an integer array arr of size N, sorted in ascending order (may contain duplicate values) and a target value k. Now the array is rotated at some pivot point unknown to you. Return True if k is present and otherwise, return False.
content.inputFormat: arr = list of integers, k = target integer
content.outputFormat: boolean indicating whether k is present in arr

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
